outline.title: Pastoral Counseling
outline.summary: Welcome to Pastoral Counseling. Develop biblical counseling skills to help your congregation. Learn to provide compassionate, Christ-centered counsel for life's challenges.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: Develop biblical counseling skills to help your congregation. This course develops your ability to provide compassionate, Christ-centered counsel for life's challenges.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: Master biblical counseling foundations and listening skills. Learn to address grief, crisis, and trauma. Develop skills in marriage and family counseling. Recognize when to refer to professionals.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: 10 comprehensive lessons covering foundations, listening skills, crisis counseling, grief and loss, marriage counseling, family counseling, addiction, mental health, boundaries, and integration.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Ready to Begin?
outline.summary: Enroll now and develop pastoral counseling skills. Provide compassionate, Christ-centered care to your congregation and community.
